name: Futurist
description: Type: Artistic.Great for: Landscapes, architecture and general use.Not good for: Portraits.Description: A recipe inspired by a Darktable colour profile that I created some years ago. It gives vibrant colours, with reds and oranges pushed and the skies turning to a stunning colour to compliment the other colours. Usually, I use this profile is used on architecture, however, it can be used as you like (but I would not recommend people!
author: Mark G Adams
